questions: How do I start a small business?
What are good small business ideas?
small business er jonno ki ki dorkar?
How do I fund a small business?
answers: To start a small business, choose an idea you're passionate about, write a business plan, register your business, set up finances, and start marketing to your target customers.
Small business shuru korte idea fix koro, plan toiri koro, business register koro, taka er management koro, ar marketing shuru koro.
Good small business ideas include freelancing, tutoring, food delivery, handmade crafts, social media management, tailoring, and local services like cleaning or repair.
Fund your small business through personal savings, loans from banks or microfinance, government grants, crowdfunding, or by finding investors who believe in your idea.
